evidence: "I'm a huge fan of model-effects, and this has loads of them."
"This is my favorite Bergman film. It's got horror, humor, drama and strangeness."
"Sometimes it becomes totally nonsensical, like they're fighting inside, then suddenly they're outside."
"If you didn't get it, just watch it 4 times or so."
"There isn't tons of action (definitely not 'non-stop' like the cover says...) but what there is, is great."
"I only wish there were a bit more a-battlin', but I can always watch it again."
"I'm not sure what other people are talking about with the lighting (I thought it was dogma '95, too)..."
"Oh so slowly did this film coax a tear from each my eyes."
"After I saw this I bought all of Mr. Kurosawa's available films."
"I pretty much saw that this was the director of Godzilla vs Gigan and Godzilla vs Megalon and took the plunge."
"I'm a huge fan of model-effects, and this has loads of them. And first-rate explosions."
"This must have been amazing in a theater... (as I presume most of these kaiju/model epics are...)"
"Oh so slowly did this film coax a tear from each my eyes."
"I enjoyed it utterly, remain rather haunted, and would recommend its study..."

summary: The user enjoys a diverse range of genres, particularly sci-fi, horror, and drama, often appreciating the emotional depth and quality of production. They show a preference for visually engaging experiences and have a notable loyalty to specific directors, particularly in the realm of manga and kaiju films.
